title: CorpFlowAI fourteen-day client onboarding journey
description: Hand-crafted SVG horizontal timeline for the public Onboarding page (https://corpflowai.com/onboarding). Shows the seven concrete operator-watched milestones in the first fourteen days of a CorpFlowAI engagement: intake submission, operator review, decision and scoping, invoice and 48-hour setup, seven-day pilot monitoring, pilot review meeting, and the continue-or-close decision. Restrained pale-cyan markers on a transparent background.

licence.terms: Original CorpFlowAI mark. Free to reuse across CorpFlowAI surfaces; do not redistribute as stock.

accessibility.alt: CorpFlowAI 14-day onboarding timeline: day 0 intake, day 1 operator review, day 2 decision and scoping, days 3-5 48-hour setup, days 6-12 operator-watched pilot, day 13 review with the owner, day 14 continue or close.

usage.primary_cta: See how the first fourteen days run
usage.notes: slot:trust_onboarding_journey. Used on the institutional /onboarding page. Keep on a dark canvas (#06111f - #101827).
